description: Create the world model layer: Area enum, AreaData, Encounter, WorldState, and AreaEvent classes. Also create two new enemies (PlagueElemental, Thornmother). Add new GameState enum values for WORLD_MAP, AREA_NAVIGATION, REST_SHRINE. This provides the data foundation for the entire world map system.
steps: Create src/model/world/Area.java enum with values: DANJINS_CORE, GOBLIN_WARRENS, BONE_CATHEDRAL, PLAGUE_GARDENS, LICHS_THRONE

Create src/model/world/AreaData.java data class with fields: Area area, String name, String description, String theme, String storyText, String uniqueMechanic, String rewardKey, List<Encounter> encounters, String bossDescription

Create src/model/world/Encounter.java data class with fields: int index, String description, String flavorText, EncounterType type (COMBAT, EVENT, BOSS), List<String> enemyTypes, int difficulty, boolean ambush. Include a static factory or builder pattern.

Create src/model/world/WorldState.java tracking class with fields: Set<Area> completedAreas, Set<String> keysCollected (Goblin King's Key, Cathedral Key, Garden Key), Map<Area,Integer> encounterProgress, Area currentArea, boolean restShrineUsed, Map<String,Integer> eventChoices (for tracking moral choices affecting ending). Methods: isAreaUnlocked(Area), isLichsThroneUnlocked(), getCurrentEncounterIndex(Area), advanceEncounter(Area), completeArea(Area), collectKey(String), recordEventChoice(String,int).
Create src/model/world/AreaEvent.java with fields: String name, String description, List<String> choices, Area area, int encounterIndex. This parallels EventRoomManager but is area-specific.

Create src/model/enemies/PlagueElemental.java extending Enemy: HP 100, ATK 12, DEF 5, Element POISON. Override attack() to apply 2 stacks of POISON (3 turns, 5 dmg each). Add shouldTelegraph override for every 3rd turn. Ability: 'Toxic Eruption' 3x POISON damage.

Create src/model/enemies/Thornmother.java extending Enemy: HP 180, ATK 20, DEF 15, Element POISON. Track vineCount field. Every 3rd turn summon a vine minion effect (heal 10 if vine alive). Ability: 'Nature's Wrath' 2.5x POISON + heal 30. Override shouldTelegraph for every 3rd turn.
Add WORLD_MAP, AREA_NAVIGATION, REST_SHRINE to src/controller/GameState.java enum
Run ./gradlew classes to verify everything compiles
acceptance_criteria: ./gradlew classes compiles successfully with all new files
WorldState tracks area progress, keys, and event choices
PlagueElemental has HP 100, ATK 12, DEF 5, Element POISON with double poison application
Thornmother has HP 180, ATK 20, DEF 15, Element POISON with vine mechanic
GameState enum includes WORLD_MAP, AREA_NAVIGATION, REST_SHRINE
verification: Run ./gradlew classes and confirm BUILD SUCCESSFUL
